response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches the reference JSON for 'OFFSIDE' and 'Deal with the devil'. 2. The JSON provided simplified lyrics; I have expanded them to match the full performance. 3. I have transcribed the mid-video MC segment, reflecting the character's unique stylized speech (e.g., 'deshu', 'arigacho'). 4. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the vocal audio waveform, including the 'La-ta-ta' vocal bridges, without early cutoffs or cross-pause merging.

subtitles.english: If this isn't how I imagined it

subtitles.english: I'll just paint it over

subtitles.original: 敗北とは 分かち合うものではないから
subtitles.english: Defeat is not something to be shared

subtitles.english: Kick it away and paint it over, see?

subtitles.english: That's just how it is

subtitles.original: はい、ふぅ〜！
subtitles.english: All right, phew!

subtitles.original: 皆さ〜ん！こんちこわ〜！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Konchikowa!

subtitles.original: 初めての生誕祭、来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming to my first birthday party!

subtitles.original: ＃タコは、轟はじめ生誕祭2025でしゅ！
subtitles.english: Our hashtag is #TodorokiHajimeSeitansai2025!

subtitles.original: たくさんポストしてくれたら嬉しいな〜！
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if you post a lot!

subtitles.original: トレンド入っちゃえ〜！
subtitles.english: Let's make it trend!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 今日は最高の色んなはじめをお届けするので、
subtitles.english: Today, I'll be delivering all kinds of Hajime in the best way,

subtitles.original: ぜひポストしてくれると嬉しいでしゅ！
subtitles.english: so please do post about it!

subtitles.original: 先ほどは「神風」と「OFFSIDE」を聞いていただきました。
subtitles.english: Earlier, you heard the songs 'Kamikaze' and 'OFFSIDE'.

subtitles.original: どうでしゅか？
subtitles.english: How were they?

subtitles.original: カッコよかったでしゅか？
subtitles.english: Were they cool?

subtitles.original: ありがちょ、ありがちょ！
subtitles.english: Thanks, thanks!

subtitles.original: ありがちょね！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: はじめはこの曲も、振り付けもめちゃくちゃ大好きなので、
subtitles.english: I really love these songs and the choreography,

subtitles.original: 披露できて嬉しいでしゅ！
subtitles.english: so I'm so happy I got to perform them!

subtitles.original: この後もまだたくさんあるので、一緒に楽しんでください！
subtitles.english: There's still more to come, so please enjoy them with me!

subtitles.original: 次は、今カッコよかったけど、
subtitles.english: Next, they were cool just now, but...

subtitles.original: ド派手なパーティーでしゅ！
subtitles.english: it's a flashy party!

subtitles.original: それでは、行きましょう！
subtitles.english: Alright then, let's go!

subtitles.original: Deal with the devil, yeah
subtitles.english: Deal with the devil, yeah

subtitles.original: 興奮 たまらないわスリル
subtitles.english: I can't get enough of the thrill

subtitles.original: 誰にも触らせない この money
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone touch this money

subtitles.original: Deal with the devil, yeah
subtitles.english: Deal with the devil, yeah

subtitles.original: 愛さえ 金で買えるわ
subtitles.english: Even love can be bought with money

subtitles.original: Up down は世の常 崩し引いた札どうしない？
subtitles.english: Ups and downs are common, what will you do with the cards you draw?

subtitles.original: 肝心なのは ストロングマインド 差し抜いて さぁ
subtitles.english: The key is a strong mind, now draw your card

subtitles.original: 行き着く先は ヘブン or ヘル
subtitles.english: The destination is heaven or hell

subtitles.original: この世界のルール たった一つ 勝者こそが正義
subtitles.english: Only one rule in this world, the winner is justice

subtitles.original: 女は度胸 散らさせるのよ あいつを
subtitles.english: A woman needs guts, I'll make him fall apart

subtitles.original: やれること何だってやる 私、賭ケグルイのクイーン
subtitles.english: I'll do anything, I'm the Kakegurui Queen

subtitles.original: Only straight you and me
subtitles.english: Only straight you and me

subtitles.original: 読み切ってイカせてよ
subtitles.english: Read through and make me win

subtitles.original: 全部さらけ出して見せて
subtitles.english: Bare it all and show me

subtitles.original: あたしのものにする あなたの髪の毛一本まで全部
subtitles.english: I'll make it mine, every single strand of your hair

subtitles.original: How million dollars you less?
subtitles.english: How many million dollars you have less?

subtitles.original: 震えてるわよ 坊や
subtitles.english: You're trembling, boy

subtitles.original: 降ろさせはしないわ
subtitles.english: I won't let you fold

subtitles.original: Deal with the devil, yeah 興奮 たまらないわスリル
subtitles.english: Deal with the devil, yeah, I can't get enough of the thrill

subtitles.original: 誰にも触らせない この money
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone touch this money

subtitles.original: How million dollars you less?
subtitles.english: How many million dollars you have less?

subtitles.original: さぁ、賭けましょう
subtitles.english: Now, let's gamble
